name: Struffoli (Honey Balls)
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk together eggs, butter, and 1 teaspoon sugar until foamy.
2. Add baking powder to the mixture.
3. Gradually add flour, working the mixture into a soft dough with your hands.
4. Divide the dough into 4 pieces.
5. On a floured surface, roll each piece into a rope about the width of your index finger and 12 inches long.
6. Cut the ropes into 1-inch pieces.
7. Toss the pieces with enough flour to dust them lightly and shake off excess flour.
8. Heat oil to 375°F in a deep fryer.
9. Fry the struffoli a few handfuls at a time until they puff up and are golden brown. Use a slotted spoon to transfer to a paper towel to drain.
10. In a large saucepan, combine honey and 1/2 cup sugar over low heat; stir until the sugar has dissolved. Keep warm over low heat.
11. Add the fried balls, a few at a time, and turn them with a wooden spoon to coat on all sides.
12. Transfer the balls to a large platter and mound them into a pyramid, shaping with wet hands.
13. Sprinkle with the colored sprinkles and let stand for 1 to 2 hours.
14. Break off pieces to eat.
